title: Simply Optimized ReForked
description: Is A Reloaded Version of Everyones Beloved Simply Optimized
body:
Simply Optimized ReForked is a continuation of the original Simply Optimized modpack after the previous project was archived.

It remains exactly the same performance-focused experience — lean, aggressive, and built purely for speed. No shaders, no decorative extras, no visual clutter. Just widely recommended optimization mods configured for maximum FPS and smooth gameplay.

This pack is designed to:

Deliver exceptional frame-rate improvements

Stay minimal and lightweight

Serve as a clean base for adding your own mods or shaders

Simply Optimized is unapologetically about performance. If you want Minecraft to run smoother first and customize later, this is your starting point.

If you're looking for built-in shader support and additional visual enhancements, consider using [Fabilously optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized)
